title: Squirrel Removal in Paramus, NJ | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Paramus, NJ. Humane trapping, exclusion, and prevention. Serving all Paramus neighborhoods. Call for fast service!
intro: Squirrels invading your Paramus home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides expert squirrel removal services throughout Paramus and surrounding Bergen County areas. Our humane removal methods ensure squirrels are safely extracted from attics, walls, and crawl spaces while preventing future entry.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Bergen County communities, we understand the unique squirrel challenges Paramus residents face. Our licensed technicians provide same-day service, lifetime warranties on exclusion work, and transparent pricing with no hidden fees.
localContext: Paramus's mature tree-lined neighborhoods around Garden State Plaza and near Van Saun County Park create ideal habitats for gray squirrels seeking attic access. The area's mix of mid-century homes and newer construction in neighborhoods like Arcola and Eastern Bergen require specialized exclusion techniques to keep squirrels out permanently.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Paramus, NJ?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Paramus typically ranges from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of exclusion work needed. This includes inspection, humane trapping, removal, entry point sealing, and cleanup of contaminated insulation if necessary.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Paramus home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Paramus. Most squirrel removals are completed within 3-7 days, though the timeline depends on how many squirrels are present and whether babies are in the nest. We'll provide a detailed timeline during your initial inspection.

faqs.question: What damage can squirrels cause in Paramus attics?
faqs.answer: Squirrels can cause extensive damage including chewed electrical wiring (creating fire hazards), destroyed insulation, damaged roof vents and soffits, and contamination from droppings and urine. They often enter through roof-soffit intersections and can chew through wood, plastic, and even thin metal to gain access.

faqs.question: Do you offer warranties on squirrel exclusion work in Paramus?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide a comprehensive warranty on all exclusion work. If squirrels re-enter through any area we've sealed, we'll return at no additional charge to resolve the issue. Our exclusion methods use heavy-gauge materials specifically designed to withstand squirrel gnawing and last for years.
